name: for_a11y
description: Accessibility checker plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO) — on-demand a11y audit for images, links, tables, headings, iframes

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_a11y/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_a11y/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_a11y/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_a11y/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
